problem: What causes chronic fatigue syndrome — no biomarker or mechanism identified
mechanism: mRNA therapy to upregulate/downregulate gene expression
hypothesis: What causes chronic fatigue syndrome — no biomarker or mechanism identified remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of mRNA. mRNA therapy to upregulate/downregulate gene expression directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Human organoid model with 35 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: If you want to find the secrets of the universe, think in terms of energy, frequency and vibration. — Tesla
